Class OpenAiChatCompletionsProvider

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.agi.event.BasicPropertyChangeSource
uno.anahata.asi.agi.provider.AbstractAiProvider
uno.anahata.asi.openai.compatible.OpenAiChatCompletionsProvider
All Implemented Interfaces:
PropertyChangeSource, Rebindable
Direct Known Subclasses:
HuggingFaceProvider, ModalProvider
public class OpenAiChatCompletionsProvider extends AbstractAiProvider
A universal AI provider for any API endpoint compatible with the OpenAI Chat Completion specification.

This provider allows the user to configure a custom baseUrl, enabling seamless integration with services like Groq, DeepSeek, or local inference servers like Ollama and vLLM.

Author:
anahata

    ensureKeysFileExists, findModel, getAllSupportedActions, getCurrentKey, getKeysAcquisitionUri, getKeysFilePath, getModels, getNextKey, getProviderDirectory, getProviderId, hasKeys, refreshModels, reloadKeyPool
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ensureKeysFileExists()
    Ensures that the api_keys.txt file exists on the host filesystem.
    Optional<? extends AbstractModel>
    findModel(String modelId)
    Finds a single model by its unique ID within this provider.
    Set<String>
    getAllSupportedActions()
    Gets a set of all unique supported actions across all models offered by this provider, using the cached model list.
    String
    getCurrentKey()
    Returns the API key currently in use by this provider instance.
    URI

    Gets the URI where users can acquire API keys for this provider.
    Path
    getKeysFilePath()
    Resolves the path to the api_keys.txt file for this provider.
    List<? extends AbstractModel>
    getModels()
    Gets the list of models, using a lazy-loaded cache.
    protected String
    getNextKey()
    Selects the next API key from the pool using a round-robin strategy.
    Path
    getProviderDirectory()
    Resolves the absolute path to the provider's storage directory.
    String
    getProviderId()
    Compatibility alias for getUuid() to maintain integration with existing IDE and UI components that expect a provider ID.
    boolean
    hasKeys()
    Checks if there are any valid (non-comment, non-empty) API keys configured for this provider.
    List<? extends AbstractModel>
    refreshModels()
    Clears the local model cache and forces a reload from the API on the next call to AbstractAiProvider.getModels().
    void
    reloadKeyPool()
    Reloads the API key pool from the provider's specific configuration file.

  • Field Details

    • customHeaders

      private Map<String,String> customHeaders
      Optional custom HTTP headers to be sent with every request. Essential for providers requiring specific vendor headers (e.g., 'X-Title', 'OpenAI-Organization').

    • preferHttp11

      private boolean preferHttp11
      Whether to prefer HTTP/1.1 over HTTP/2. Essential for some local inference servers and home routers with port forwarding.

  • Constructor Details

    • OpenAiChatCompletionsProvider

      public OpenAiChatCompletionsProvider()
      Constructs a default OpenAI-compatible provider.

      Initializes the display name to 'Universal' and sets the default tokenizer to TokenizerType.CL100K_BASE. Required for Kryo deserialization.

    • OpenAiChatCompletionsProvider

      public OpenAiChatCompletionsProvider(String uuid, String displayName, String baseUrl)
      Constructs a new universal provider with basic configuration.
      Parameters:
      uuid - The unique provider ID.
      displayName - The user-facing name.
      baseUrl - The API endpoint URL.

    • OpenAiChatCompletionsProvider

      public OpenAiChatCompletionsProvider(String uuid, String displayName, String baseUrl, String folderName, String apiKeyAdquisitionUri)
      Constructs a new universal provider with a custom storage folder and acquisition URI.
      Parameters:
      uuid - The unique provider ID.
      displayName - The user-facing name.
      baseUrl - The API endpoint URL.
      folderName - The custom folder name for configuration and key storage.
      apiKeyAdquisitionUri - The URI where users can obtain API keys for this provider.

  • Method Details

    • createHttpClient

      public HttpClient createHttpClient()
      Creates a pre-configured HttpClient based on the provider's protocol preferences.
      Returns:
      A new HttpClient instance.

    • createRequestBuilder

      public HttpRequest.Builder createRequestBuilder(String endpoint)
      Creates a pre-configured HttpRequest.Builder with Authorization and custom headers.
      Parameters:
      endpoint - The relative endpoint path (e.g., "models" or "chat/completions").
      Returns:
      A new HttpRequest.Builder.

    • isRetryable

      public boolean isRetryable(int statusCode, String responseBody)
      Determines if an HTTP status code or response body indicates a transient failure that should trigger a retry or rotation.

      Checks for common OpenAI-compatible error codes (429, 503, 500, 499, 408).

      Parameters:
      statusCode - The HTTP status code.
      responseBody - The raw response body.
      Returns:
      true if retryable, false otherwise.

    • hokusPocus

      public void hokusPocus()
      Resets the internal state of the provider, typically to force a key rotation.

      Implementation details: Subclasses should override this method to nullify their native API clients, ensuring they are reconstructed with the next available key from the pool.

      Triggers a hokus-pocus rotation to the next API key in the pool, rebinding any active clients.

      Overrides:
      hokusPocus in class AbstractAiProvider

    • listModels

      public List<? extends AbstractModel> listModels()
      Fetches the list of all models available from the provider's API. This method is intended to be called by the caching mechanism.

      Implementation details: Performs a GET request to the /models endpoint of the configured getBaseUrl(). Parses the standard OpenAI list-response and wraps each ID in an OpenAiCompatibleModel instance.

      Specified by:
      listModels in class AbstractAiProvider
      Returns:
      A list of provider-specific AbstractModel objects.

    • createModel

      protected OpenAiCompatibleModel createModel(com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode node)
      Constructs a concrete model instance for this provider.
      Parameters:
      node - The JSON node containing model metadata.
      Returns:
      A new model instance.

    • getApiKeyHint

      public String getApiKeyHint()
      Gets a template or hint string to display when the API keys file is empty.

      Implementation details: Provides a standard header hint for the multi-key configuration file.

      Specified by:
      getApiKeyHint in class AbstractAiProvider
      Returns:
      The API key hint text.
